@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_precond (paren_string : String) : Prop :=
  True

lemma String.string_eq_iff_data_eq (s1 : String) (s2 : String)
  : s1.data = s2.data ↔ s1 = s2 := by
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact String.ext (by simpa using h)
  · intro h
    simpa [h]

def count_paren_groups_helper
    (paren_string : String) (num_open : Int) (num_groups : Nat) : Nat :=
  if _empty : paren_string.isEmpty then
    num_groups
  else
    let c := paren_string.get! 0
    match c with
    | '(' => count_paren_groups_helper (paren_string.drop 1) (num_open + 1) num_groups
    | ')' =>
      let new_num_groups := match num_open == 1 with | true => num_groups + 1 | false => num_groups
      count_paren_groups_helper (paren_string.drop 1) (num_open - 1) new_num_groups
    | _ => count_paren_groups_helper (paren_string.drop 1) num_open num_groups
  termination_by paren_string.length
  decreasing_by
    all_goals
      rw [String.drop_eq, String.length]
      simp
      rw [String.isEmpty_iff] at _empty
      by_cases h_len : paren_string.length ≤ 0
      · rw [Nat.le_zero_eq] at h_len
        rw [← String.string_eq_iff_data_eq] at _empty
        have heq : "".data = [] := by simp
        rw [heq] at _empty
        rw [String.length] at h_len
        rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at h_len
        contradiction
      · omega

def count_paren_groups (paren_string : String) : Nat :=
  count_paren_groups_helper paren_string 0 0

def balanced_paren (s : String) (l r : Char) : Bool :=
  let cs := s.toList
  let rec go (cs : List Char) (bal : Int) : Bool :=
    match cs with
    | [] => bal == 0
    | c :: rest =>
      if c == l then
        go rest (bal + 1)
      else if c == r then
        if bal == 0 then
          false
        else
          go rest (bal - 1)
      else
        go rest bal
  go cs 0

def one_group (s : String) : Bool :=
  decide (count_paren_groups s = 1)

def memStr (s : String) (xs : List String) : Bool :=
  xs.any (fun t => decide (t = s))

def inResult (str : String) (result : List String) : Bool :=
  memStr str result

def allIJ (n : Nat) : List (Nat × Nat) :=
  ((List.range n).flatMap (fun j =>
    (List.range (j + 1)).map (fun i => (i, j))))

def allSubstringsSpec (s : String) : List String :=
  let n := s.length
  (allIJ n).map (fun ij =>
    let i := ij.1
    let j := ij.2
    ((s.take (j + 1)).drop i))

def forward_spec_b (paren_string_filtered : String) (result : List String) : Bool :=
  (allSubstringsSpec paren_string_filtered).all (fun substr_ij =>
    if balanced_paren substr_ij '(' ')' && one_group substr_ij then
      inResult substr_ij result
    else
      true)

def backward_spec_b (paren_string_filtered : String) (result : List String) : Bool :=
  result.all (fun str =>
    paren_string_filtered.containsSubstr str &&
      balanced_paren str '(' ')' &&
      one_group str)

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_postcond
    (paren_string : String)
    (result : List String)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) : Bool :=
  let paren_string_filtered :=
    (paren_string.toList.filter (fun c => c == '(' ∨ c == ')')).asString
  forward_spec_b paren_string_filtered result &&
    backward_spec_b paren_string_filtered result

def implementation (paren_string : String)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) : List String :=
  let filtered := paren_string.toList.filter (fun c => c == '(' ∨ c == ')')
  let rec aux (cs : List Char) (cur : List Char) (balance : Int) (acc : List String) : List String :=
    match cs with
    | [] => acc.reverse
    | c :: rest =>
      let new_cur := cur ++ [c]
      let new_balance := if c = '(' then balance + 1 else balance - 1
      if new_balance = 0 then
        let group := new_cur.asString
        aux rest [] 0 (group :: acc)
      else
        aux rest new_cur new_balance acc
  aux filtered [] 0 []

theorem implementation_postcond_satisfied
    (paren_string : String)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) :
    implementation_postcond paren_string (implementation paren_string h_precond) h_precond = true := by
  sorry

end cleverbench_1

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_precond (_paren_string : String) : Prop :=
  True

def stepOpen (cur : Int) (c : Char) : Int :=
  if c = '(' then cur + 1
  else if c = ')' then cur - 1
  else cur

def stepMax (state : Int × Nat) (c : Char) : Int × Nat :=
  let cur  := stepOpen state.1 c
  let best := Nat.max state.2 cur.toNat
  (cur, best)

def count_max_paren_depth (s : String) : Nat :=
  (s.foldl stepMax (0, 0)).2

def parenOnly (s : String) : Prop :=
  ∀ c, c ∈ s.toList → c = '(' ∨ c = ')'

def prefixNeverMoreRight (s : String) : Prop :=
  let cs := s.toList
  ∀ i, i ≤ cs.length →
    (cs.take i).count ')' ≤ (cs.take i).count '('

def balanced_paren_non_computable (s : String) (l r : Char) : Prop :=
  l = '(' ∧ r = ')' ∧
  s.length > 0 ∧
  parenOnly s ∧
  prefixNeverMoreRight s ∧
  s.toList.count '(' = s.toList.count ')'

def balanced_paren_b (s : String) : Bool :=
  let cs := s.toList
  0 < cs.length &&
  cs.all (fun c => c = '(' || c = ')') &&
  (cs.count '(' = cs.count ')') &&
  (List.range (cs.length + 1)).all (fun i =>
    (cs.take i).count ')' ≤ (cs.take i).count '(')

def implementation (paren_string : String) (_h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) : List Int :=
  (paren_string.splitToList (fun x => x = ' '))
    |>.map (fun grp => (count_max_paren_depth grp : Int))

def implementation_postcond_b (paren_string : String) : Bool :=
  let groups := paren_string.splitToList (fun x => x = ' ')
  let result := implementation paren_string (by trivial)
  result.length = groups.length &&
  (List.range result.length).all (fun i =>
    !balanced_paren_b (groups[i]!) ||
    (result[i]! > 0 && count_max_paren_depth (groups[i]!) = (result[i]!).toNat))

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_postcond (paren_string : String) (result : List Int)
    (_h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) : Prop :=
  result = implementation paren_string _h_precond ∧ implementation_postcond_b paren_string = true

theorem implementation_postcond_satisfied
    (paren_string : String)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond paren_string) :
    implementation_postcond paren_string (implementation paren_string h_precond) h_precond := by
  sorry

end cleverbench_6_refactored

def is_palindrome (s : String) : Bool :=
  s = s.toList.reverse.asString

partial def implementationAux (string : String) : String :=
  let chars := string.toList
  let rec is_palindrome (s : List Char) : Bool :=
    match s with
    | [] => true
    | [_] => true
    | x :: rest => x = rest.getLast! && is_palindrome (rest.dropLast)
  let rec find_suffix_len (s : List Char) (len : Nat) : Nat :=
    if len == 0 then 0
    else if is_palindrome (s.take len) then len
    else find_suffix_len s (len - 1)
  let suffix_len := find_suffix_len chars chars.length
  let remaining := chars.drop suffix_len
  (chars ++ remaining.reverse).asString

def implementation (string : String) (_h : implementation_precond string) : String :=
  -- !benchmark @start code
  implementationAux string
  -- !benchmark @end code

@[reducible, simp]

  -- !benchmark @start postcond
  is_palindrome result ∧
  result.length ≥ string.length ∧
  string.isPrefixOf result ∧
  (∀ possible_palindrome : String,
    string.isPrefixOf possible_palindrome →
    is_palindrome possible_palindrome →
    result.length ≤ possible_palindrome.length)
  -- !benchmark @end postcond

    implementation_postcond string (implementation string h_precond) h_precond := by
  -- !benchmark @start proof

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_precond (a : String) (b : String) : Prop :=
  True

def implementation (a b : String) (_h : implementation_precond a b) : String :=
  let rec aux (a_list b_list : List Char) : List Char :=
    match a_list, b_list with
    | [], [] => []
    | a_c :: a_rest, b_c :: b_rest =>
      (if a_c = b_c then '0' else '1') :: aux a_rest b_rest
    | _, _ => []
  (aux a.toList b.toList).asString

def implementation_postcond_bool (a b : String) : Bool :=
  if a.length ≠ b.length then true
  else
    let result := implementation a b (by trivial)
    let al := a.toList
    let bl := b.toList
    let rl := result.toList
    result.length = a.length &&
    result.all (fun c => c = '0' || c = '1') &&
    (List.range a.length).all (fun i =>
      (!(al.getD i '?' = bl.getD i '?') || rl.getD i '?' = '0') &&
      ((al.getD i '?' = bl.getD i '?') || rl.getD i '?' = '1'))

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_postcond (a : String) (b : String) (result : String) (_h : implementation_precond a b) : Prop :=
  result = implementation a b _h ∧ implementation_postcond_bool a b = true

theorem implementation_postcond_satisfied (a : String) (b : String) (h_precond : implementation_precond a b) :
    implementation_postcond a b (implementation a b h_precond) h_precond := by
  sorry

def fibComp : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 0
  | 1 => 1
  | n + 2 =>

      match k with
      | 0 => a
      | 1 => b
      | k + 2 => go k b (a + b)
    go n 0 1

  r = fibComp n

instance : DecidablePred (fun p : Nat × Nat => fibonacci_dec p.1 p.2) := by
  intro p; dsimp [fibonacci_dec]; infer_instance

  dsimp [fibonacci_dec]; infer_instance

  let rec fib (n : Nat) (a : Nat) (b : Nat) : Nat :=

        let sorted_group := current_group.mergeSort (fun (_, c1) (_, c2) => c1 ≥ c2)

def implementationAux (grid: List (List Nat)) (k: Nat) : List Nat :=
  if k == 0 || grid.length == 0 then []
  else
    let n := grid.length
    let rec find_all_paths (current_path : List Nat) (visited : List (Nat × Nat)) (remaining : Nat) : List (List Nat) :=
      if remaining == 0 then [current_path.reverse]
      else
        match current_path with
        | [] =>
          let all_starts := (List.range n).foldl (fun acc i => acc ++ (List.range n).map (fun j => (i, j))) []
          (all_starts.foldl (fun acc (i, j) =>
            let value := ((grid[i]!)[j]!)
            acc ++ find_all_paths [value] [(i, j)] (remaining - 1)) [])
        | _ :: _ =>
          let last_pos := visited.head!
          let (last_i, last_j) := last_pos
          let neighbors := [
            (last_i + 1, last_j),
            (if last_i > 0 then (last_i - 1, last_j) else (n, n)),
            (last_i, last_j + 1),
            (if last_j > 0 then (last_i, last_j - 1) else (n, n))
          ].filter (fun (i, j) => i < n && j < n && !visited.contains (i, j))
        (neighbors.foldl (fun acc (i, j) =>
          let value := ((grid[i]!)[j]!)
          acc ++ find_all_paths (value :: current_path) ((i, j) :: visited) (remaining - 1)) [])
    termination_by remaining
    decreasing_by
      simp_wf
      · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro heq; simp [heq] at *)
      · apply Nat.sub_lt
        · exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro heq; simp [heq] at *)
        · exact Nat.zero_lt_succ 0
    let all_paths := find_all_paths [] [] k
    if all_paths.length == 0 then []
    else
      let rec find_lex_min (paths : List (List Nat)) (best : List Nat) : List Nat :=
        match paths with
        | [] => best
        | path :: rest =>
        let rec compare (a b : List Nat) (idx : Nat) : Bool :=
          if idx >= a.length || idx >= b.length then false
          else if a[idx]! < b[idx]! then true
          else if a[idx]! > b[idx]! then false
          else compare a b (idx + 1)
        termination_by a.length - idx
        decreasing_by
          simp_wf
          have h : idx < a.length := Nat.lt_of_not_ge (by simp at *; omega)
          rw [← Nat.sub_sub a.length idx 1]
          apply Nat.sub_lt
          · exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h
          · exact Nat.zero_lt_succ 0
        let new_best := if compare path best 0 then path else best
        find_lex_min rest new_best
      find_lex_min all_paths all_paths[0]!

def digit_sum (n : Int) : Int :=
  let ds := (toString n.natAbs).toList.map fun c => c.toNat - Char.toNat '0'
  match ds with
  | [] => 0
  | d :: ds' =>
    let tail := ds'.foldl (· + ·) 0
    if n < 0 then Int.ofNat tail - Int.ofNat d
    else Int.ofNat (d + tail)

  match nums with
  | [] => []
  | _ =>
    let rec find_best (remaining : List Int) (current_best : Int) (current_best_idx : Nat) (idx : Nat) :
        Int × Nat :=
      match remaining with
      | [] => (current_best, current_best_idx)
      | x :: rest =>
        let sum_x := digit_sum x
        let sum_best := digit_sum current_best
        if sum_x > sum_best then
          find_best rest x idx (idx + 1)
        else if sum_x = sum_best && idx ≥ current_best_idx then
          find_best rest x idx (idx + 1)
        else
          find_best rest current_best current_best_idx (idx + 1)

    let rec aux (remaining : List Int) : List Int :=
      match remaining with
      | [] => []
      | [x] => [x]
      | x :: _ =>
        let (best, best_idx) := find_best remaining x 0 0
        let remaining' := remaining.eraseIdx best_idx
        best :: aux remaining'
    aux nums

  implementationAux nums

def sameMultisetBool (xs ys : List Int) : Bool :=
  let u := (xs ++ ys).eraseDups
  u.all (fun a => decide (xs.count a = ys.count a))

def chooseBest (nums : List Int) : Int × Nat :=
  match nums with
  | [] => (0, 0)
  | x :: _ =>
    let rec find_best (remaining : List Int) (current_best : Int) (current_best_idx : Nat) (idx : Nat) :
        Int × Nat :=
      match remaining with
      | [] => (current_best, current_best_idx)
      | y :: rest =>
        let sum_y := digit_sum y
        let sum_best := digit_sum current_best
        if sum_y > sum_best then
          find_best rest y idx (idx + 1)
        else if sum_y = sum_best && idx ≥ current_best_idx then
          find_best rest y idx (idx + 1)
        else
          find_best rest current_best current_best_idx (idx + 1)
    find_best nums x 0 0

def headDominatesBool (nums : List Int) (head : Int) (headIdx : Nat) : Bool :=
  let head_sum := digit_sum head
  (List.range nums.length).all (fun i =>
    if h : i < nums.length then
      let num := nums.get ⟨i, h⟩
      let sum := digit_sum num
      decide (head_sum > sum ∨ (head_sum = sum ∧ i ≤ headIdx))
    else
      true)

  let multisetOk := sameMultisetBool nums result

  let emptyCase : Bool :=
    decide (nums = []) && decide (result = [])

  let nonemptyCase : Bool :=
    decide (nums ≠ []) &&
      (let (head, headIdx) := chooseBest nums
       let tail := nums.eraseIdx headIdx
       decide (result = head :: implementationAux tail) &&
       headDominatesBool nums head headIdx)

  multisetOk && (emptyCase || nonemptyCase)

    let sm := (extension.toList.filter (fun c => c.isLower)).length

  let max_strength : Int :=
    if h : strengths.length > 0 then
      strengths.foldl (fun acc s => if s > acc then s else acc) strengths[0]!
    else 0
  let best_idx : Nat :=
    (List.range extensions.length).find? (fun i => strengths[i]! == max_strength) |>.getD 0

  let extension_name : String := extensions[best_idx]!
  let expected : String := class_name ++ "." ++ extension_name

  (0 < extensions.length ∧ extensions.all (fun x => 0 < x.length) ∧ 0 < class_name.length) →
    result = expected

    (h_precond : implementation_precond (class_name) (extensions)) :
    implementation_postcond (class_name) (extensions)
      (implementation class_name extensions h_precond) h_precond := by
  sorry

def countRepetitions : List Char → Char → Nat → Nat
| [], _, n => n
| (h :: t), c, n => if h = c then countRepetitions t c (n + 1) else n

def maxRepetitions : Char → Nat
| 'i' | 'x' | 'c' | 'm' => 3
| 'v' | 'l' | 'd'       => 1
| _                    => 0

partial def validRepetition : List Char → Bool
| [] => true
| c :: rest =>
  let max := maxRepetitions c
  let count := countRepetitions rest c 1
  count ≤ max ∧ validRepetition (rest.drop (count - 1))

def romanCharToValue : Char → Nat
| 'i' => 1
| 'v' => 5
| 'x' => 10
| 'l' => 50
| 'c' => 100
| 'd' => 500
| 'm' => 1000
| _   => 0

def romanToDecimalAux : List Char → Nat
| [] => 0
| c1 :: c2 :: rest =>
    let val1 := romanCharToValue c1
    let val2 := romanCharToValue c2
    if val1 < val2 then
      (val2 - val1) + romanToDecimalAux rest
    else
      val1 + romanToDecimalAux (c2 :: rest)
| [c] => romanCharToValue c

def romanToDecimal (s : String) : Nat :=
  romanToDecimalAux s.data

def validSubtractivePairs : List (Char × Char) :=
  [('i', 'v'), ('i', 'x'), ('x', 'l'), ('x', 'c'), ('c', 'd'), ('c', 'm')]

def validSubtractiveOrder : List Char → Bool
| [] | [_] => true
| c1 :: c2 :: rest =>
  match romanCharToValue c1, romanCharToValue c2 with
  | v1, v2 =>
    if v1 < v2 then
      (c1, c2) ∈ validSubtractivePairs ∧ validSubtractiveOrder rest
    else if v1 = 0 ∨ v2 = 0 then
      false
    else
      validSubtractiveOrder (c2 :: rest)

def isValidRoman (s : String) : Bool :=
  s.data.all (λ c => romanCharToValue c ≠ 0) ∧
  validRepetition s.data ∧
  validSubtractiveOrder s.data

partial def implementationAux (num: Nat) : String :=
let roman_values := [(1000, "m"), (900, "cm"), (500, "d"), (400, "cd"), (100, "c"), (90, "xc"), (50, "l"), (40, "xl"), (10, "x"), (9, "ix"), (5, "v"), (4, "iv"), (1, "i")]
let rec convert (n : Nat) (values : List (Nat × String)) (acc : String) : String :=
  match values with
  | [] => acc
  | (value, symbol) :: rest =>
    if n >= value then
      convert (n - value) values (acc ++ symbol)
    else
      convert n rest acc
convert num roman_values ""

  -- !benchmark @start code
  implementationAux num

  isValidRoman result ∧ romanToDecimal result = num

    implementation_postcond (num) (implementation num h_precond) h_precond := by

@[simp] def unique_chars (s : String) : Nat :=
  s.toList.eraseDup.length

def implementation (words : List String) (h_precond : implementation_precond (words)) : String :=
  if hlen : words.length = 0 then
    ""
  else
    let unique_counts := words.map unique_chars
    let max_unique := unique_counts.foldl (fun acc c => if c > acc then c else acc) 0
    let candidates := words.filter (fun w => unique_chars w == max_unique)
    match hc : candidates with
    | [] => ""
    | c0 :: cs =>
        (c0 :: cs).foldl (fun acc w => if w < acc then w else acc) c0

@[simp] def maxNatList (xs : List Nat) : Nat :=
  xs.foldl (fun acc c => if c > acc then c else acc) 0

@[simp] def implementation_postcondB (words : List String) (result : String) : Bool :=
  let unique_counts := words.map unique_chars
  let max_unique := maxNatList unique_counts
  let candidates := words.filter (fun w => unique_chars w == max_unique)

  let emptyOk : Bool :=
    (!decide (words = [])) || (result == "")

  let minimalOk : Bool :=
    List.all candidates (fun w => decide (result ≤ w))

  let inCandidates : Bool :=
    candidates.elem result

  let bodyOk : Bool :=
    decide (words = []) || (inCandidates && minimalOk)

  emptyOk && bodyOk

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_postcond (words : List String) (result : String)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond (words)) : Prop :=
  implementation_postcondB words result = true

    (h_precond : implementation_precond (words)) :
    implementation_postcond (words) (implementation words h_precond) h_precond := by

def applyOp (x y : Int) : String → Option Int
  | "+"  => some (x + y)
  | "-"  => some (x - y)
  | "*"  => some (x * y)
  | "//" => if y == 0 then none else some (x / y)
  | "**" =>
    if x < 0 then none
    else some (Int.ofNat ((Int.toNat x) ^ (Int.toNat y)))
  | _     => none

inductive evalArith_pass : List String → Int → Prop
| num {s : String} {n : Nat} (h : s.toNat! = n) :
    evalArith_pass [s] (Int.ofNat n)
| binOp {ts1 ts2 : List String} {op : String} {r1 r2 r : Int}
    (h1 : evalArith_pass ts1 r1)
    (h2 : evalArith_pass ts2 r2)
    (hop : applyOp r1 r2 op = some r) :
    evalArith_pass (ts1 ++ op :: ts2) r

inductive evalArith_exp : List String → Int → Prop
| of_pass {ts r} (h : evalArith_pass ts r) : evalArith_exp ts r
| step {ts1 ts2 r1 r2 r} (h1 : evalArith_exp ts1 r1) (h2 : evalArith_exp ts2 r2)
    (hop : applyOp r1 r2 "**" = some r) :
    evalArith_exp (ts1 ++ "**" :: ts2) r

inductive evalArith_mul : List String → Int → Prop
| of_exp {ts r} (h : evalArith_exp ts r) : evalArith_mul ts r
| step {ts1 ts2 r1 r2 r} (h1 : evalArith_mul ts1 r1) (h2 : evalArith_mul ts2 r2)
    (hop : applyOp r1 r2 "*" = some r ∨ applyOp r1 r2 "//" = some r) :
    evalArith_mul (ts1 ++ "*" :: ts2) r

inductive evalArith_add : List String → Int → Prop
| of_mul {ts r} (h : evalArith_mul ts r) : evalArith_add ts r
| step {ts1 ts2 r1 r2 r} (h1 : evalArith_add ts1 r1) (h2 : evalArith_add ts2 r2)
    (hop : applyOp r1 r2 "+" = some r ∨ applyOp r1 r2 "-" = some r) :
    evalArith_add (ts1 ++ "+" :: ts2) r

def mergeAlternately : List Nat → List String → List String
| [], []       => []
| [], y :: ys  => y :: mergeAlternately [] ys
| x :: xs, []  => x.repr :: mergeAlternately xs []
| x :: xs, y :: ys => x.repr :: y :: mergeAlternately xs ys

def evalArith_precedence (ts : List String) (r : Int) : Prop :=
  evalArith_add ts r

partial def implementationAux (operator: List String) (operand : List Nat) : Int :=
let tokens := mergeAlternately operand operator
let rec eval_add (ts : List String) : Int :=
  let rec eval_mul (ts : List String) : Int :=
    let rec eval_exp (ts : List String) : Int :=
      let rec eval_pass (ts : List String) : Int :=
        match ts with
        | [s] => s.toInt?.getD 0
        | _ =>
          let rec find_op (i : Nat) : Option (Nat × String) :=
            if i >= ts.length then none
            else if ts[i]! == "+" || ts[i]! == "-" || ts[i]! == "*" || ts[i]! == "//" || ts[i]! == "**" then
              some (i, ts[i]!)
            else find_op (i + 1)
          match find_op 0 with
          | some (idx, op) =>
            let left := ts.take idx
            let right := ts.drop (idx + 1)
            let r1 := eval_pass left
            let r2 := eval_pass right
            match applyOp r1 r2 op with
            | some r => r
            | none => 0
          | none => 0
      match ts with
      | [] => 0
      | _ =>
        let rec find_exp (i : Nat) : Option Nat :=
          if i >= ts.length then none
          else if ts[i]! == "**" then some i
          else find_exp (i + 1)
        match find_exp 0 with
        | some idx =>
          let left := ts.take idx
          let right := ts.drop (idx + 1)
          let r1 := eval_exp left
          let r2 := eval_exp right
          match applyOp r1 r2 "**" with
          | some r => r
          | none => 0
        | none => eval_pass ts
    match ts with
    | [] => 0
    | _ =>
      let rec find_mul (i : Nat) : Option Nat :=
        if i >= ts.length then none
        else if ts[i]! == "*" || ts[i]! == "//" then some i
        else find_mul (i + 1)
      match find_mul 0 with
      | some idx =>
        let left := ts.take idx
        let right := ts.drop (idx + 1)
        let r1 := eval_mul left
        let r2 := eval_mul right
        match applyOp r1 r2 ts[idx]! with
        | some r => r
        | none => 0
      | none => eval_exp ts
  match ts with
  | [] => 0
  | _ =>
    let rec find_add (i : Nat) : Option Nat :=
      if i >= ts.length then none
      else if ts[i]! == "+" || ts[i]! == "-" then some i
      else find_add (i + 1)
    match find_add 0 with
    | some idx =>
      let left := ts.take idx
      let right := ts.drop (idx + 1)
      let r1 := eval_add left
      let r2 := eval_add right
      match applyOp r1 r2 ts[idx]! with
      | some r => r
      | none => 0
    | none => eval_mul ts
eval_add tokens

def implementation (operator: List String) (operand : List Nat)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond operator operand) : Int :=

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_precond (a : Nat) (b : Nat) : Prop :=
  True

partial def implementationAux (a b : Nat) : List Nat :=
  let min_val := min a b
  let max_val := max a b
  if min_val == max_val && min_val % 2 == 1 then []
  else
    let start := if min_val % 2 == 0 then min_val else min_val + 1
    let end_val := if max_val % 2 == 0 then max_val else max_val - 1
    if start > end_val then []
    else
      let rec generate (current : Nat) (acc : List Nat) : List Nat :=
        if current > end_val then acc.reverse
        else generate (current + 2) (current :: acc)
      generate start []

def implementation (a b : Nat) (h_precond : implementation_precond a b) : List Nat :=
  implementationAux a b

def allEvenB (r : List Nat) : Bool :=
  r.all (fun n => n % 2 == 0)

def isAscendingBy2B : List Nat → Bool
  | [] => true
  | [_] => true
  | x :: y :: xs => ((y - x) == 2) && isAscendingBy2B (y :: xs)

def implementation_postcondB (a b : Nat) (result : List Nat) : Bool :=
  let min_a_b := min a b
  let max_a_b := max a b
  let startExpected := if min_a_b % 2 == 0 then min_a_b else min_a_b + 1
  let endExpected := if max_a_b % 2 == 0 then max_a_b else max_a_b - 1
  let specialCase := (min_a_b == max_a_b) && (min_a_b % 2 == 1)
  let emptyRange := startExpected > endExpected
  allEvenB result &&
    isAscendingBy2B result &&
    (if specialCase || emptyRange then
        result == []
     else
        (result.length ≥ 1) &&
        (result.head? == some startExpected) &&
        (result.getLast? == some endExpected))

@[reducible, simp]
def implementation_postcond (a : Nat) (b : Nat) (result : List Nat)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond a b) : Prop :=
  implementation_postcondB a b result = true

theorem implementation_postcond_satisfied (a : Nat) (b : Nat)
    (h_precond : implementation_precond a b) :
    implementation_postcond a b (implementation a b h_precond) h_precond := by
  sorry
